title: EasySpleef
body:
EasySpleef is a simple and easy to use solution to adding spleef arenas to your server!

Commands:

Sets arena after selecting two positions with wooden shovel
/setarena <arena name>

Resets snow in spleef arena
/resetarena <arena name>

Remove an arena
/removearena <arena name>

List all available arenas
/listarenas
